text.title: PM Tools Comparison Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the PM Tools Comparison artefact. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: only 1 tool (need >=2); criteria_weights missing; scores missing evidence + 4 of 5 criteria; tco missing; no decision_owner; recommendation doesn't match the tools listed.

antipattern.description: Status set to an approved/sent state by the producing agent without a human reviewer entry.
Required field empty or replaced with a placeholder (n/a, unknown) without an anchored reason.
Prose paragraph stuffed into a field the schema declares as array or object.
